messages.author: mueslimaker
messages.text: I was able to build it and run it on my t-deck plus with these changes: diff --git a/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h b/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h index 35ee448..7dcd3f4 100644 --- a/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h +++ b/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h @@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ * Failure to heed the above warning may result in bricked module. */ #if !defined(RADIOLIB_GODMODE) - #define RADIOLIB_GODMODE (0) + #define RADIOLIB_GODMODE (1) #endif /* diff --git a/platformio.ini b/platformio.ini index 01e8179..1bc55dd 100644 --- a/platformio.ini +++ b/platformio.ini @@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ board_build.arduino.memory_type = qio_opi board_build.flash_mode = qio ; Libraries path for both local libs and TDeck example libs -lib_dirs = +lib_extra_dirs = ${PROJECT_DIR}/lib ; Deps (edited)
messages.content_html: I was able to build it and run it on my t-deck plus with these changes: diff --git a/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h b/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h index 35ee448..7dcd3f4 100644 --- a/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h +++ b/lib/RadioLib/src/BuildOpt.h @@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ * Failure to heed the above warning may result in bricked module. */ #if !defined(RADIOLIB_GODMODE) - #define RADIOLIB_GODMODE (0) + #define RADIOLIB_GODMODE (1) #endif /* diff --git a/platformio.ini b/platformio.ini index 01e8179..1bc55dd 100644 --- a/platformio.ini +++ b/platformio.ini @@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ board_build.arduino.memory_type = qio_opi board_build.flash_mode = qio ; Libraries path for both local libs and TDeck example libs -lib_dirs = +lib_extra_dirs = ${PROJECT_DIR}/lib ; Deps (edited)

Have you been able to build the code recently?

messages.author: mueslimaker
messages.text: I dunno if using RADIOLIB_GODMODE is wise for a foundation to build off of. I suspect stuff is being referenced incorrectly. It may be that the class being used needs to be extended so that private methods or properties can be made available
messages.content_html: I dunno if using RADIOLIB_GODMODE is wise for a foundation to build off of. I suspect stuff is being referenced incorrectly. It may be that the class being used needs to be extended so that private methods or properties can be made available
messages.reply_html:
Ben
awesome. can you send a PR @mueslimaker ?

messages.reply_html:
Ben
ben@Bens-MacBook-Pro MeshCore % git diff diff --git a/src/helpers/radiolib/CustomSX1262Wrapper.h b/src/helpers/radiolib/CustomSX1262Wrapper.h index 119f6dc..f02b78d 100644 --- a/src/helpers/radiolib/CustomSX1262Wrapper.h +++ b/src/helpers/radiolib/CustomSX1262Wrapper.h @@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ public: float getLastSNR() const override { return ((CustomSX1262 *)_radio)->getSNR(); } float packetScore(float snr, int packet_len) override { - int sf = ((CustomSX1262 *)_radio)->spreadingFactor; + int sf = 10; // ((CustomSX1262 *)_radio)->spreadingFactor; return packetScoreInt(snr, sf, packet_len); } }; ben@Bens-MacBook-Pro MeshCore %
